vocab.example: I'll send you the quotation for the new order today.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ gửi bạn báo giá cho đơn hàng mới hôm nay.

vocab.example: We itemize every cost so you can see what you're paying for.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi liệt kê chi tiết từng khoản để bạn thấy rõ mình trả cho gì.

vocab.example: This quotation is valid until the end of the month.
vocab.example_vi: Báo giá này có hiệu lực đến cuối tháng.

vocab.example: The unit price drops if you order more than fifty units.
vocab.example_vi: Đơn giá sẽ giảm nếu bạn đặt hơn năm mươi đơn vị.

vocab.example: Let me walk you through the cost breakdown on page two.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi giải thích bảng phân tích chi phí ở trang hai.

vocab.example: Can you revise the quotation to include installation fees?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể chỉnh sửa báo giá để thêm phí lắp đặt không?

vocab.example: Each line item shows the product name and its price.
vocab.example_vi: Mỗi khoản mục hiển thị tên sản phẩm và giá của nó.

vocab.example: The total cost includes tax and shipping.
vocab.example_vi: Tổng chi phí đã bao gồm thuế và phí vận chuyển.

listening.title: Explaining a quotation to a client

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: Hi Khang, I've just sent you the quotation for your order.

lines.speaker: Khang (client)
lines.text: Thanks, Hoa. Can you explain how the price is calculated?

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: Sure, we itemize every product so you can see each line item.

lines.speaker: Khang (client)
lines.text: I see. What's the unit price for the standard package?

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: It's two hundred dollars, but the price drops for bulk orders.

lines.speaker: Khang (client)
lines.text: Could you show me the full cost breakdown?

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: Of course, it's on page two, right above the total cost.

lines.speaker: Khang (client)
lines.text: Got it. Also, can you revise it to include installation fees?

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: No problem, I'll send a revised quotation this afternoon.

lines.speaker: Khang (client)
lines.text: Great, how long is this quotation valid until?

lines.speaker: Hoa (sales rep)
lines.text: It's valid until the end of this month.

lines.speaker: Khang (client)
lines.text: Perfect, I'll review it with my manager and get back to you.

questions.q: What does Hoa send to Khang at the start?
What does Khang ask Hoa to add to the quotation?
How long is the quotation valid?
options: Until the end of the month

shadowing: I've just sent you the quotation for your order today.
We itemize every product so you can see each line item.
Could you please show me the full cost breakdown on page two?
Can you revise it to include the installation fees too?
This quotation is valid until the end of the month.
